productDisplayName: Puma Men's Complete Vectana White Sliver Black Shoe
description: Get used to maximum comfort and performance during runs with these Complete Vectana 2 shoes from puma. Equipped with patented M2D Technology for added stability, these shoes work as hard as you to help you run longer and stronger.Upper Sandwich-mesh material for a high degree of breathability and lowering risk of blistering Reflective elements allow secure running in low light conditions Synthetic overlays in formstripe and cat logo design for secure Fit and style Lace-ups for snug fit Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Midsole Comfort Last maximizes fit and comfort, and covers the specific anatomical and biomechanical needs of the runner OthoLite Sockliner gives more comfort, material regeneration, air circulation, and antimicrobial function IdCELL, a low-density cushioning unit improves shock absorption and protects your foot KMS Lite midsole that provides better cushioning and reduces weight Outsole EverFoam in the heel adjusts to your heel contour ArchTec guides the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off Decoupled heel construction that distributes impact across the outsole allowing softer propulsion duoCELL, a long-lasting CELL unit in the heel, employed for improved shock absorption EverRide, a blown rubber outsole, reduces weight and improves forefoot cushioning EverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole, provides durability in high-wear areas M2D, a second density on the medial side, stabilizes the foot during the stance phase
